events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a staged wire pulling setup where tools and materials match the referenced sheet, are clean, intact, and properly sized. No defects are flagged. The reference materials are NEC 200.6 (grounded conductor identification) and 210.5 (identification of branch circuit conductors).

Since everything is staged correctly and matches the plans, this is a pass.
